evidence_rows.interpretation: Old adapter gives only small gain over linear and remains far below recovery targets.
Old adapter gives only small gain over linear and remains far below recovery targets.
Raising anchor q-bit does not repair the old adapter.
The old adapter is the bottleneck, not renderer/data loading.
Raising anchor q-bit does not repair the old adapter.
The old adapter is the bottleneck, not renderer/data loading.
Training gain is tiny or absent under the old architecture/objective.
Longer continuation did not provide reliable improvement.

Longer continuation did not provide reliable improvement.
StreamSplat base is more plausible than old adapter but still not enough without GS residual side-info.
StreamSplat base is more plausible than old adapter but still not enough without GS residual side-info.
Quality gain came from counted GS-domain residual side-info, not from the old adapter predictor alone.
Quality gain came from counted GS-domain residual side-info, not from the old adapter predictor alone.
Even best current keyframe/selector ceiling remains below the requested target.

decision_rows.evidence: Stage145 best gain 0.011427207695934527 dB; Stage146 best gain 0.0 dB with best step 0.
decision_rows.action_for_new_route: Do not spend Stage201+ on continuing GaussianAnchorDynamicPredictor unchanged.

decision_rows.evidence: Stage143 q12-to-float32 old adapter middle PSNR changes are about 0.000 dB.
decision_rows.action_for_new_route: Use qbit as rate/ablation variable only, not the primary quality fix.

decision_rows.evidence: Stage157/158 quality is achieved by counted GS residual side-info over StreamSplat base, not by the old adapter alone.
decision_rows.action_for_new_route: Design predictor and residual codec jointly; measure predictor-only before selector training.

decision_rows.evidence: Old per-Gaussian MLP residual over linear interpolation underfits motion/occlusion and saturates.
decision_rows.action_for_new_route: Stage200 must propose a stronger temporal refiner/motion-field architecture with render-aware and RD-aware gates.

requirement_rows.reason: Selector cannot help if non-keyframe reconstruction is weak.
requirement_rows.stage_gate: Stage201 must beat old adapter and show stable render metrics before Stage206+.

requirement_rows.reason: Stage158 showed residual side-info is the practical quality lever, but the final method must remain GS-domain.
requirement_rows.stage_gate: Stage203/204 must define counted GS latent/residual bitstreams, not image residuals.

requirement_rows.reason: Stage193 showed selector training is wasted without candidate-space headroom.
requirement_rows.stage_gate: Stage207 DP oracle must beat fixed baselines before Stage209 selector training is promoted.

requirement_rows.reason: Stage177/180 sampled gains overstated full-sequence effect.
requirement_rows.stage_gate: Stage211 must include full-sequence PSNR/SSIM/MS-SSIM/LPIPS and measured bytes.

next: Build Stage199 learned GS training manifest under Stage197 decoder contract.
